evals.name: AI Model Deployment Methodology
evals.prompt:
You need to deploy a Llama 3 model on OpenShift AI. The cluster has NVIDIA GPUs available.

Describe your model deployment methodology: what serving runtimes are available, how you select the right one, how you validate GPU availability, how you create the InferenceService, and how you monitor the deployment rollout.
evals.expected_output: A deployment methodology using KServe InferenceService with runtime selection (vLLM, NVIDIA NIM, Caikit+TGIS), GPU pre-flight checks (node availability, taints, tolerations), hardware profile lookup, and rollout monitoring with pod status checks.
assertions: The output describes selecting between serving runtimes: vLLM, NVIDIA NIM, and Caikit+TGIS, explaining when each is appropriate.
The output describes GPU pre-flight validation: checking node availability, GPU taints, and configuring tolerations on the InferenceService.
The output describes creating a KServe InferenceService custom resource as the deployment mechanism.
The output describes monitoring the deployment rollout by checking predictor pod status and InferenceService readiness conditions.
